AI automation for the Brewing industry

From grain to glass, with the back office already automated.

We deploy AI workers across brewing operations, batch release, on-trade dispense, procurement and sustainability reporting — so brewmasters and commercial teams stop chasing paperwork and focus on the beer. Fixed-price. First agents live in 8–12 weeks.

Book a demo Download the automation map
Built for the regulatory rhythm of brewing  ·  Sustainability disclosures, packaging-waste rules and alcohol-tax compliance — kept audit-ready, in every market you operate.
The numbers behind every engagement

GlobalCoverage
The Brewing Reality

Your margins live and die between the brewhouse and the tap.

Brewers lose 3–7 points of margin to back-office friction: commodity volatility, slow batch release, draft-service downtime, and sustainability reporting that eats QA and regulatory teams alive.

1

Malt, hops and aluminum move faster than your team.

Raw-material prices swing 20–30% year over year. Most brewers can't hedge, switch suppliers or reformulate fast enough — by the time they reconcile, margin is already on the floor.

2

Batch release and freshness drown in paper.

Release decisions wait on COAs, micro results and sensory panels scattered across LIMS, ERP and spreadsheets. Days of stock sit on hold. Sensory drift goes undetected. Recalls stay one preventable mistake away.

3

Draft service quality is invisible at the tap.

Thousands of dispensers across pubs and HoReCa run on inconsistent line cleaning, gas pressure and technician dispatch. Each bad pour erodes the brand the marketing team paid to build.

4

Skilled people waste hours on admin.

Brewmasters, planners, KAMs and plant controllers spend 30–40% of their week on reports, reconciliations, dunning and audits — work that an AI worker can do without breaks.

The MLM Approach

Custom agents, built for every brewery department.

We don't deploy generic software. We design AI workers around the processes, tools and people of each function — then connect them where it matters. Click any department to explore.

What you get

Outcomes, not software licenses. Fully covered.

We don't sell tools. We deliver outcomes. Here's what every engagement guarantees — activated on day one.

mlm.deployment.status All systems operational
Automation rate We typically automate up to 85% of the human effort across every back-office process we tackle.
Up to 85%
Active
Throughput multiplier Each process runs 5–10x faster. Your team handles more without breaking a sweat — execution speeds up, error rates drop.
5–10x
Active
Payback period The majority of engagements pay for themselves inside twelve months — tied to a hard ROI model.
<12 mo
Locked
Fixed price, no surprises Every engagement is fixed-price. If a process can't be automated, you get a voucher to automate another one.
Fixed
Guaranteed
Global coverage Teams across the US, Nordics, UK, Netherlands, Luxembourg, Belgium, and Germany. On-site when you need us.
Global

Enterprise-grade security GDPR-aligned, with full audit trails and role-based access on every agent action.

Secure
6 / 6 capabilities covered Deployment complete
Frequently asked

Answers before the first call.

First automations typically go live within 8–12 weeks. Most engagements reach payback inside 12 months. We don't run multi-year transformation programs — we deliver working agents fast and iterate.
No. Our agents sit on top of what you have — your ERP, MES/SCADA, LIMS, dispenser telemetry, retailer EDI, supplier portals and BI stack. Where an integration doesn't exist, our agents operate the same screens your staff uses today.
They move up the value chain. Brewmasters, QA leads, plant controllers, demand planners and KAMs stay in control — every agent action is auditable and reversible, and humans retain ultimate responsibility. What goes away is copy-paste and reconciliation, not judgement.
Fixed-price per workflow automation. If during delivery we determine a process cannot be automated, you receive a voucher to automate a different process instead. Optional SLAs range from business-hours support to 24/7 coverage.
Hosted in the region of your choice, GDPR-aligned, with role-based access, full audit trails and the option of private deployment for enterprise clients. Your data is never used to train anyone else's models.
Brewhouse setpoint sync and process anomaly detection, batch release and sensory tracking, demand and S&OP support, malt/hops/CO2 procurement and AP matching, draft-dispenser fleet monitoring and technician dispatch, supplier ESG and scope 3 data collection, packaging-waste compliance, and trade-promotion planning. We scope per department — every agent is custom-built around your recipes, breweries and accounts.
JF
Ready when you are

Still questions? Talk to our experts.

30 minutes with a member of the MLM team. Bring one painful process — leave with a concrete plan and fixed-price proposal.
